heading: Management plan
label: 460ffff–2 Management plan
notes: DefinitionsFor definition of “Secretary” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 3 of Pub. L. 103–433section 410aaa of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Not later than 3 years after , in accordance with subsections (b) and (c), the Secretary shall develop a comprehensive plan for the long-term management of the Scenic Area.March 12, 2019
appropriate State, Tribal, and local governmental entities, including Inyo County and the Tribe;
utilities, including Southern California Edison Company and the Los Angeles Department of Water and Power;
the Alabama Hills Stewardship Group; and

children.heading: Requirement
children.label: c Requirement
children.text: In accordance with this subchapter, the management plan shall include provisions for maintenance of existing public utility and other rights-of-way within the Scenic Area.

children.heading: Incorporation
children.label: d Incorporation
children.text: In developing the management plan, in accordance with this section, the Secretary may allow casual use mining limited to the use of hand tools, metal detectors, hand-fed dry washers, vacuum cleaners, gold pans, small sluices, and similar items.

children.heading: Interim management
children.label: e Interim management
children.text: Pending completion of the management plan, the Secretary shall manage the Scenic Area in accordance with .section 460ffff–1(b) of this title
